name: The Miracle of Teddy Bear
original_name: คุณหมีปาฏิหาริย์
overview: When a young man's teddy bear reveals itself in human form, it tries to find out more about its past — before its time as a human runs out.

trailers.title: [TRAILER ENG SUB] คุณหมีปาฏิหาริย์ (The miracle of Teddy Bear) Ch3Thailand | WITHINNPIE
